description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock with a rich brown finish, extending into a long, slender barrel made of dark metal. The receiver and trigger assembly are compact and robust, with visible iron sights mounted along the top of the barrel. The rifle has two barrel bands securing the wooden fore-end, and a metal buttplate at the end of the stock. The bolt handle is visible on the right side, indicating a bolt-action mechanism. The overall design is reminiscent of early to mid-20th century military rifles, with a utilitarian yet elegant appearance.
description: A long, bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and dark metal barrel, featuring iron sights and a classic military design.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the front sight post.
description_view_1: The right side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, bolt handle, trigger, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the butt end, emphasizing the stock's width and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: The left side view reveals the wooden stock, barrel bands, and the overall streamlined profile of the rifle.
